sub_strands.sub_strand: Critical Listening for Argumentation and Interviewing Skills
outcomes: Analyze extended oral arguments to evaluate the validity of evidence and identify logical fallacies like circular reasoning
Conduct structured interviews on community issues using open-ended questions, active listening, and appropriate follow-up strategies

sub_strands.sub_strand: Thematic Analysis and Intensive Reading
outcomes: Critique the development of plot, characterization, and conflict in full-length African novellas
Examine features of functional graphics, tables, and charts to synthesize complex information within research texts

sub_strands.sub_strand: Functional Writing and Complex Grammatical Structures
outcomes: Write clear business letters, curriculum vitae (CVs), and argumentative compositions based on contemporary data
Apply accurate grammatical structures including past perfect continuous tense, relative clauses, and inverted sentence patterns

sub_strands.sub_strand: Ufahamu wa Kusikiliza na Majadiliano ya Hoja
outcomes: Kuchanganua taarifa, habari, au matangazo changamano kutoka vyombo vya habari na kutoa tathmini muhimu
Kuwasilisha hotuba za ushawishi na kushiriki katika mijadala inayozingatia kanuni za utafiti na ushahidi

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uchambuzi wa Tamthilia, Ushairi, na Maandishi ya Kitaaluma
outcomes: Kufafanua tanzu za fasihi simulizi (kama vile miviga, maghani, au maigizo) na kubaini dhima zake katika jamii
Kusoma na kufupisha makala ya kisayansi au ya kijamii yakizingatia ujumbe mkuu

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uandishi wa Kitaalamu na Matumizi ya Lugha
outcomes: Kuandika barua rasmi za kibiashara, kumbukumbu za mikutano (minutes), na insha za ulinganuzi
Kutumia viunganishi vya masharti, mnyambuliko wa vitendo katika kauli mbalimbali, na ngeli kwa usahihi wa hali ya juu

sub_strands.sub_strand: Linear Inequalities and Simultaneous Equations
outcomes: Formulate, solve, and represent linear inequalities in one variable on a standard number line
Solve pairs of simultaneous linear equations in two variables using substitution and elimination methods

sub_strands.sub_strand: Approximation and Standard Form
outcomes: Express large and small decimal numbers in standard scientific form ($A \times 10^n$ where $1 \le A < 10$)
Round numbers to a specified number of significant figures

sub_strands.sub_strand: Surface Area and Volume of Pyramids and Cones
outcomes: Calculate the surface area and volume of right pyramids and right circular cones using their respective dimensional properties
Solve real-world conversion challenges linking units of density, mass, and cubic volumes

sub_strands.sub_strand: Angle Properties of Polygons
outcomes: Find the sum of interior and exterior angles of regular and irregular convex polygons

sub_strands.sub_strand: Measures of Central Tendency and Probability Frameworks
outcomes: Calculate the mean, median, and mode for ungrouped data sets, and interpret them contextually
Determine the experimental and theoretical probability of simple combined outcomes using tree diagrams

sub_strands.sub_strand: Atomic Structure, Chemical Symbols, and Simple Equations
outcomes: Describe the atomic structure in terms of protons, neutrons, and electrons, and deduce mass and atomic numbers
Write down names, standard chemical symbols, and word equations for reactions between simple elements and oxygen or water

sub_strands.sub_strand: Static Electricity and Current Electricity Circuits
outcomes: Investigate static electricity charges using a gold-leaf electroscope setup
Set up serial and parallel electric circuits using cells, bulbs, switches, and ammeters to monitor current dynamics

sub_strands.sub_strand: Human Reproductive System and Excretory Homeostasis
outcomes: Describe the structural anatomy and physiological roles of the male and female human reproductive systems
Explain the role of the skin and kidneys in human temperature regulation and osmoregulation homeostasis

sub_strands.sub_strand: Climate Change Challenges and Adaptation Strategies
outcomes: Analyze the natural and human causes of climate change globally and assess its explicit impacts across Africa
Formulate and implement local-scale climate mitigation and adaptation frameworks within the school community

sub_strands.sub_strand: Pre-Colonial African Societies and Citizenship Dynamics
outcomes: Examine the socio-political organization of selected pre-colonial African kingdoms and communities
Analyze categories of Kenyan citizenship, processes of naturalization, and factors threatening national cohesion

sub_strands.sub_strand: Electoral Process and Civic Awareness
outcomes: Outline the components, values, and importance of democratic electoral cycles in Kenya, highlighting IEBC functional matrices

sub_strands.sub_strand: Isometric Drawing Projections and Circuit Layouts
outcomes: Construct accurate isometric drawings of basic blocks and mechanical joints from provided orthographic planes
Interpret and draw elementary schematic wiring circuits utilizing international electronic symbols

sub_strands.sub_strand: Simple Mechanisms and Power Transmission
outcomes: Identify and demonstrate the working mechanisms of levers, pulleys, gears, and inclined planes in daily machinery
Apply safety procedures when handling electrical components, soldering devices, or localized bench hand-tools

sub_strands.sub_strand: Crop Pests Management and Domestic Livestock Feeding
outcomes: Identify common field and storage crop pests, analyzing their damage and executing non-chemical biological controls
Classify livestock feeds into roughages and concentrates, and balance simple feeding ratios for domestic farm units

sub_strands.sub_strand: Food Hygiene, Reheating Food, and Kitchen Tools Maintenance
outcomes: Demonstrate proper methods of reheating leftover meals safely to eliminate bacterial toxins and minimize nutrient depletion
Clean, sharpen, and apply rust-prevention maintenance routines across a variety of kitchen utensils and structural tools

sub_strands.sub_strand: Fabric Decoration, Block Printing, and Digital Photography
outcomes: Create balanced block-printed designs on textile substrates using localized motifs and sustainable ink solutions
Edit digital images using software extensions to alter exposure, contrast, cropping bounds, and narrative values

sub_strands.sub_strand: Musical Scale Building, Group Drama, and Score Auditing
outcomes: Construct and sing major musical scales (including C major and G major) on staff grids using proper key signatures
Rehearse and present original skits or short plays featuring clear climactic resolutions, sound effects, and spatial blockers
